summary: Completed testing of ToolProgressIndicator streaming bullets feature. All frontend and backend features working correctly. 9/9 frontend tests passed, 5/5 backend tests passed.
passed_tests: Frontend: ToolProgressIndicator (data-testid='tool-progress-indicator') appears when loading=true after sending message
Frontend: All 3 streaming bullet steps exist in DOM (tool-step-0, tool-step-1, tool-step-2)
Frontend: Step 0 shows 'Reading Vidyasiri Scholarship PDF...' with Search icon
Frontend: Step 1 shows 'Checking eligibility...' with ClipboardCheck icon
Frontend: Step 2 shows 'Generating filled form...' with FileOutput icon
Frontend: Shimmer bar animates at top of progress card (tool-shimmer-bar class)
Frontend: Spinner (animate-spin) appears in header during loading
Frontend: ToolProgressIndicator disappears after response arrives
Frontend: Eligibility card (data-testid='eligibility-card-eligible') renders with Vidyasiri result
Frontend: PDF download button (data-testid='pdf-download-btn') renders after scholarship query
Backend: POST /api/chat with scholarship query returns Vidyasiri eligible result
Backend: Response includes eligibility_results array with scheme details
Backend: Response includes pdf_url for downloadable PDF
Backend: Response includes tool_calls with eligibility_matcher tool trace
Backend: DEMO_MODE response completes in < 2 seconds
Backend: Generated PDF is downloadable at /api/pdf/{id}
critical_code_review_comments: ToolProgressIndicator component correctly uses useState + useEffect with staggered setTimeout timers (0ms, 650ms, 1300ms)
CSS animations (tool-step-enter, tool-icon-pulse, tool-check-pop, tool-shimmer-bar) properly defined in index.css
TOOL_STEPS array contains correct text: 'Reading Vidyasiri Scholarship PDF...', 'Checking eligibility...', 'Generating filled form...'
ChatPage.js uses ToolProgressIndicator instead of old TypingIndicator when loading is true
Minor ESLint warning in ChatPage.js line 127 (useCallback missing dependency) - non-blocking
context_for_next_testing_agent: ToolProgressIndicator streaming bullets feature fully implemented and tested. Component shows 3 steps with staggered timing when loading. Steps use Search, ClipboardCheck, FileOutput icons from lucide-react. CSS animations include tool-step-enter (slide-in), tool-icon-pulse (glow), tool-check-pop (scale), tool-shimmer-bar (gradient slide). DEMO_MODE triggers instant Vidyasiri result for scholarship/student/education keywords. Auth uses mock OTP 1234.

mocked_apis_list: DEMO_MODE: scholarship queries return hardcoded Vidyasiri Scholarship result
auth: static OTP 1234 for any phone number
